sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n29833" key="dwrofori/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δωρο-φορία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n29833.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bringing of presents</tr_>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">v.l. in</abbr> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0031.tlg006.perseus-grc1:15:31" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Ep.Rom.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">15.31</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0640.tlg001:1:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alciphr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.6</biblScope> </bibl> (pl.), <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:4:47" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.47</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
